title: gonolobus roeanus
intro: Gonolobus roeanus, also known as the Mexican milkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gonolobus roeanus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
